task_completion.description: A terminal window is open and shows command activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal/console window is visible on screen with text output

task_completion.description: HL7 message was sent via MLLP using netcat or similar tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows a printf/nc command with hex bytes (0x0b, 0x1c) or netcat connection to port 6661

task_completion.description: An acknowledgment or response was received after sending
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows ACK response text or MSA segment after the send command

task_completion.description: Channel statistics were verified showing message receipt
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows API statistics response with received count > 0, or dashboard shows message count

task_completion.description: Dashboard shows message statistics for the channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows NextGen Connect dashboard with non-zero RECEIVED or SENT counts

integrity.description: A channel is deployed and listening before message is sent
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal or dashboard shows a channel in STARTED state before the message send attempt

privileged_info_for_vlm: A channel is pre-created listening on port 6661. The agent needs to send an HL7 message using MLLP framing (printf with 0x0b/0x1c/0x0d bytes piped to netcat). Success indicators: (1) netcat command to port 6661, (2) ACK response received, (3) API statistics showing received > 0.
